name: Cheesy Sausage Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first five ingredients.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. Add eggs and milk to the sausage mixture, stirring until just moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into greased miniature muffin pans, filling them 3/4 full.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
6. Remove from the pan immediately.
Makes 2 dozen.
